  "title": "Secretary / Typist",
  "description": "Prime Montessori School-For over 25 years, Prime Montessori Nursery and Primary School has been at the forefront of Montessori learning in Nigeria. Situated in idyllic surroundings in the heart of mainland Lagos, Prime Montessori School boasts of secure well aged buildings which house modern learning facilities. Our motto, &ldquo;Quest for Excellence,&rdquo; represents an eternal quest for academic achievement and a primary focus on high educational standards. It is a voyage through waters unknown to the shores of educational enlightenment.

A Prime Montessori School education is one that is centred around the Nigerian academic curriculum delivered through active classroom learning and further enhanced with the aid of facilities such as our Art studio, Library, Science lab, IT room, Music room, and Montessori room. Our staff is handpicked based on in-house criteria revolving around teacher-student dynamics.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary / Typist

Job Location:&nbsp;Amuwo Odofin, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a well-organised and proactive individual to manage administrative tasks. Male candidates preferred.


Requirements


	Minimum of ONDqualification or equivalent.
	Minimum of two years secretarial/administrative experience.
	Strong computer skills and good proficiencyin Microsoft Word, Excel and Google Workspace.
	50 WPM typing speed.
	Good communication skills.
	Ability to work independently.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to:&nbsp;prime.montessori2@gmail.comusing the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Secretary / Typist Job at Prime Montessori School




        
    

        
        Prime Montessori School-For over 25 years, Prime Montessori Nursery and Primary School has been at the forefront of Montessori learning in Nigeria. Situated in idyllic surroundings in the heart of mainland Lagos, Prime Montessori School boasts of secure well aged buildings which house modern learning facilities. Our motto, “Quest for Excellence,” represents an eternal quest for academic achievement and a primary focus on high educational standards. It is a voyage through waters unknown to the shores of educational enlightenment.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



A Prime Montessori School education is one that is centred around the Nigerian academic curriculum delivered through active classroom learning and further enhanced with the aid of facilities such as our Art studio, Library, Science lab, IT room, Music room, and Montessori room. Our staff is handpicked based on in-house criteria revolving around teacher-student dynamics.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary / Typist

Job Location: Amuwo Odofin, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a well-organised and proactive individual to manage administrative tasks. Male candidates preferred.


Requirements


	Minimum of ONDqualification or equivalent.
	Minimum of two years secretarial/administrative experience.
	Strong computer skills and good proficiencyin Microsoft Word, Excel and Google Workspace.
	50 WPM typing speed.
	Good communication skills.
	Ability to work independently.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected]using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales and Marketing Manager (Oil Palm)",
  "description": "Bridgemead HR provides customized HR solutions to optimize workforce productivity and profitability. Our expert trainers design bespoke training programs, innovative HR strategies, and efficient payroll systems tailored to each client&rsquo;s unique needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales and Marketing Manager (Oil Palm)

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	Lead the company&rsquo;s commercial strategy by driving revenue growth, market expansion, and brand positioning.
	The Sales and Marketing Manager is responsible for developing and executing strategic sales plans while building strong customer relationships across local and international markets.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement sales and marketing strategies to achieve revenue targets.
	Identify new market opportunities and expand customer base.
	Manage key accounts and build long-term client relationships.
	Oversee pricing strategies, product positioning, and market penetration.
	Lead negotiations and close high-value sales deals.
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer preferences.
	Develop and manage marketing campaigns and promotional activities.
	Collaborate with production and logistics teams to ensure order fulfillment.
	Prepare sales forecasts, budgets, and performance reports.
	Lead, supervise, and mentor the sales and marketing team.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Revenue Growth Rate &gt; 25% quarterly
	Sales Target Achievement &gt; 90% monthly
	Customer Retention Rate &gt; 85% annually
	Market Share Growth &gt; 15% annually
	New Customer Acquisition &gt; 20% quarterly
	Average Deal Closure Rate &gt; 70%
	Marketing ROI &gt; 60% per campaign


Requirements/Qualifications
Educational Qualifications:


	BSc or HND in Marketing, Business Administration, Economics, or related field.


Professional Certifications:


	Relevant certifications in Sales, Marketing, or Digital Marketing (CIM, NIMN, etc.).


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;career.bridgemeadnghr@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of&nbsp; the mail.",

Sales and Marketing Manager (Oil Palm) Job at Bridgemead HR. and Advisory




        
    

        
        Bridgemead HR provides customized HR solutions to optimize workforce productivity and profitability. Our expert trainers design bespoke training programs, innovative HR strategies, and efficient payroll systems tailored to each client’s unique needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales and Marketing Manager (Oil Palm)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Lead the company’s commercial strategy by driving revenue growth, market expansion, and brand positioning.
	The Sales and Marketing Manager is responsible for developing and executing strategic sales plans while building strong customer relationships across local and international markets.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement sales and marketing strategies to achieve revenue targets.
	Identify new market opportunities and expand customer base.
	Manage key accounts and build long-term client relationships.
	Oversee pricing strategies, product positioning, and market penetration.
	Lead negotiations and close high-value sales deals.
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer preferences.
	Develop and manage marketing campaigns and promotional activities.
	Collaborate with production and logistics teams to ensure order fulfillment.
	Prepare sales forecasts, budgets, and performance reports.
	Lead, supervise, and mentor the sales and marketing team.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Revenue Growth Rate > 25% quarterly
	Sales Target Achievement > 90% monthly
	Customer Retention Rate > 85% annually
	Market Share Growth > 15% annually
	New Customer Acquisition > 20% quarterly
	Average Deal Closure Rate > 70%
	Marketing ROI > 60% per campaign


Requirements/Qualifications
Educational Qualifications:


	BSc or HND in Marketing, Business Administration, Economics, or related field.


Professional Certifications:


	Relevant certifications in Sales, Marketing, or Digital Marketing (CIM, NIMN, etc.).


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of  the mail.
